image_prompt: A highly detailed and slightly whimsical digital painting set in a vibrant, bustling urban square. People are depicted engaging in various absurd listening attempts: one person is holding a large magnifying glass to their eye to "see" sounds, another is trying to "smell" music with their nose, and a third is attempting to "taste" a conversation with their tongue out. In the foreground, a calm and wise-looking character with comically large, attentive ears is genuinely listening to a soft melody played by a street musician. The Portuguese text "PARA OUVIR, USE OS OUVIDOS." is subtly integrated as part of a street sign or a thought bubble above the attentive listener, rendered in a clean, legible font. The overall mood is lighthearted and thought-provoking, with a rich color palette.
caption: Parece óbvio, né? Mas quantas vezes a gente realmente *escuta*? 👂 Em um mundo cheio de ruídos, a arte de ouvir de verdade é um superpoder. Pratique a escuta ativa e veja o mundo se abrir! Qual a melhor dica que você já ouviu? Me conta! 👇 #EscutaAtiva #CoisasObvias #OuvirÉArte #ComunicaçãoConsciente #DicaDoDia #VerdadesDaVida
